calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Transferring Assets Into Trust.
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Off Calendar

Cross-Petition For Reformation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Pauline Bolton Swank, Steuart Rainford and Amy Bolton (Petitioners/Beneficiaries). James Barringer for John Gray. Thomas Stikker for Stanley Moore (Trustee).

The Court granted the Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement (signing the order for the same in open court). Therefore, the Cross Petition for Reformation of the Trust and the Petition for Instructions were taken off calendar. Mr. Stikker stated that he was in the process of revising the accounting to reflect the settlement, that the Parties needed to approve the accounting and requested a three week continuance to try and resolve the matter. The matter was continued to December 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioners Pauline Boulton Swank, Amy Boulton And Stuart Rainford'S Petition: For Instructions Concerning Interpretation And Construction Of Trust In
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Continued To Nov-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Continued To Oct-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jessica Williams for John Gray (Petitioner/Beneficiary). Thomas Stikker for Stanley Moore (Trustee). Michael Freedman for Pauline Swank, May Boulton and Stewart Rainfort.

The Parties stated that they settled, that the accounting was set for October 20, 2010 and requested a continuance for filing of the petition for approval of the settlement (hearing date of November 3, 2010 approved for said petition). Today's matters were continued to November 3, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting petition was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petitioners Pauline Boulton Swank, Amy Boulton And Stuart Rainford'S Petition: For Instructions Concerning Interpretation And Construction Of Trust In
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Continued To Nov-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Cross-Petition For Reformation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Continued To Nov-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Cross-Petition For Reformation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Continued To Oct-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Pauline Swank.

Mr. Freedman requested a continuance stating that mediation was set for October 12, 2010, that the petition for settlement of the account was set for October 13, 2010 and that it was the consensus of all Parties to continue the matter. The matters were continued to October 13, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Mr. Freedman will speak to Counsel with regard to continuing the matter further out to October 20, 2010.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petitioners Pauline Boulton Swank, Amy Boulton And Stuart Rainford'S Petition: For Instructions Concerning Interpretation And Construction Of Trust In
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Continued To Oct-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioners Pauline Boulton Swank, Amy Boulton And Stuart Rainford'S Petition: For Instructions Concerning Interpretation And Construction Of Trust In
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Continued To Sep-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Cross-Petition For Reformation Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Continued To Sep-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for John Gray (Respondent/Cross-Petitioner). Tom Sticker for Stanley Moore (Trustee). Michael Freedman for Pauline Swank.

Mr. Stikker stated that he did not feel that he was actually engaged in this dispute and that he supported mediaiton. Counsel agreed to participate in mediation (order for the same signed in open Court). Mediation is to be completed by September 10, 2010. The matters were continued to September 14, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Mr. Stikker is to prepare an order with regard to the Citibank Account ending in 908 being an asset of the Trust (agreed upon by all Counsel). Mr. Freedman requested that the Court dispense with future notice to The University of Liverpool, The University of Chicago, The University of California, and the National Acadamy of Science stating that they are no longer interested Parties as they were contingent Beneficiaries and that there are Survivors (named Beneficiaries) in being. The Court confirmed that future notice to said Parties is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petitioners Pauline Boulton Swank, Amy Boulton And Stuart Rainford'S Petition: For Instructions Concerning Interpretation And Construction Of Trust In
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Continued To Jul-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
